feat.name: Deflecting Pulse
feat.text:
Your ostilli can use its stored magic to protect you from other magic, granting you the Turn Aside Ambient Magic action.  
  
 **Turn Aside Ambient Magic** (concentrate) Your ostilli glows a faint yellow as it establishes a barrier. Choose acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage. Until the beginning of your next turn, you gain resistance against the chosen damage type equal to half your level.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
